name: orchestratekit-mcp
description: Local stdio MCP server for OrchestrateKit — evidence-backed playbooks for AI workflow design.

scripts.build: tsup src/server.ts src/server-http.ts --format esm --out-dir dist --clean && node -e "const{cpSync,writeFileSync}=require('fs');cpSync('registry','dist/registry',{recursive:true});writeFileSync('dist/registry/_build_manifest.json',JSON.stringify({built_at:new Date().toISOString()}));console.log('registry/ copied to dist/registry/ with build manifest')"
scripts.verify: pnpm typecheck && pnpm registry:lint && pnpm test
